identity.title: Printing A Sequence of Repeated Numbers (Case 1)

content.prompt: Construct a program that receives an integer N from the user and prints a sequence of space-separated numbers from 1 to N such that each number in the sequence is repeated 5 times. For example, if N is 6, the program will print the following sequence:\n11111 22222 33333 44444 55555 66666
